project_type: Next.js 16 App Router financial budgeting web app (BudgetWise)
build_system: npm with Next.js CLI. AGENTS.md warns about Next.js 16 breaking changes - must check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ for API differences.
test_framework: No test framework installed. Verification is via build + lint.
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build - should complete with 0 errors. 2. Run npm run lint - should pass with 0 errors.
setup_instructions: Dependencies already installed in node_modules (npm). Just run npm run build to verify.
environment_constraints: No real backend - all data persists in localStorage. No test runner installed. Validate via build + lint only. Network may be limited for npm install but node_modules already present.
contribution_requirements: Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes. Ensure Semantic HTML for all layout sections. Follow existing patterns in app/dashboard/page.tsx for component structure.
key_patterns: Client components use 'use client' directive. Auth via React Context (app/context/AuthContext.tsx). localStorage for data persistence with keys prefixed 'budgetwise_'. Dashboard layout has sidebar nav + header + route protection. Tailwind CSS 4 with custom theme colors (primary-50..900, neutral-50..900). App Router file-based routing under app/ directory.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router root. app/dashboard/ - protected dashboard area with layout.tsx (sidebar+header). app/context/ - React Context providers. app/login/ - login page. app/onboarding/ - 4-step personalization. app/components/ - landing page components. public/ - static assets.
